execute.description: Execute live/write path.

flashbots-auth-key.description: Optional Flashbots auth key or signer reference for the Ethereum Pandora rebalance leg.

flashbots-target-block-offset.description: Optional target block offset for Flashbots/private bundle submission.

hedge-scope.description: Hedge basis. total includes held Pandora outcome tokens in addition to pool reserves; pool hedges only the AMM reserves.

execute.description: Set true to permit live/mutating execution when supported by the tool.

polymarket-rpc-url.description: Polygon RPC URL for Polymarket preflight; comma-separated fallbacks are tried in order. This does not override Pandora reserve reads on --rpc-url.

price-source.description: Reserve source for Pandora pricing. on-chain refreshes outcome-token balances before sizing; indexer uses verify payload reserves.

profile-file.description: Path to a signer profile file.

rebalance-mode.description: Rebalance sizing mode. atomic targets the source price in one Pandora leg when reserves are available; incremental sizes by observed drift.

rebalance-route.description: Pandora-leg execution route. public preserves ordinary mempool submission; auto chooses a private route when supported; flashbots-private requests single-tx private relay submission; flashbots-bundle requests Flashbots bundle semantics for approval+trade paths. This affects only the Ethereum Pandora leg.

rebalance-route-fallback.description: Fallback policy when the requested Pandora-leg private route is unsupported or rejected. fail stops the run; public degrades to ordinary public submission. This does not change Polygon hedge semantics.

skip-gate.description: Set to "true" to skip all mirror sync gates, or provide a comma-delimited named skip list.

strict-close-time-delta.description: Promote close-time delta mismatches from diagnostic to blocking.

notes: The default mirror stop file is ~/.pandora/mirror/STOP. Its presence intentionally blocks local mirror sync starts and ticks until cleared.
